cryptoAssumptionSupportGraph.statement: Env.verifier accepts each (publicKey, message, signature) under at most one domain.
Env.verifier accepts each (publicKey, message, domain) under at most one signature.
Env.verifier accepts each (message, domain, signature) under at most one publicKey.

limitations: Solidity parsing is a narrow restricted shape extractor for the AAPQ sketch.
Does not run solc or compare against Yul.
Does not verify external-call, ABI, calldata, memory, gas, or reentrancy semantics.
Verifier is an abstract oracle in the Lean models.

verifierModelCalibrations.name: AllFieldsEqualToyVerifier
verifierModelCalibrations.nonClaim: Deliberately non-cryptographic verifier model for assumption-discharge calibration only.

verifierModelCalibrations.name: KeyDomainBindingToyVerifier
verifierModelCalibrations.nonClaim: Deliberately non-cryptographic two-pair binding model (signature ↔ key, message ↔ domain) for assumption-discharge calibration only.

verifierModelCalibrations.name: DerivedSignatureModel
verifierModelCalibrations.nonClaim: Parametric model: signature = derive(key, message, domain) for any derive function with explicit injectivity-in-key and injectivity-in-domain hypotheses. No concrete derive instance is committed; this is a shape, not a scheme.
